description: Legal document concerning a wife agreement to the reduction of her delayed marriage gift from 70 to 20 dinars and renounces the title of trustworthiness granted her in the marriage contract. Dated Nisan 1437 Seleucid (March-April 1126 CE). (Information from Mediterranean Society, II, pp. 256, 412, 483)
description_he: מסמך משפטי מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
